recent_commits.subject: Persist rich report narrative for fast reads
Avoid live LLM work on public report reads

evidence: web/app.py includes index, analyze, status, report, reports_list, and brand routers
reports and brand listing routes remain production surfaces
visual signature routes are namespaced under /visual-signature
critical Visual Signature route tests passed
no scoring mutation found in route smoke or tested path
web/routes/brand3_lab.py docstring says Experimental Brand3 lab routes
production report path does not enable it
usage requires opt-in experimental narrative flag

py_compile.command: ./.venv/bin/python -m py_compile web/app.py web/config.py web/routes/*.py web/middleware/*.py web/workers/*.py src/reports/*.py

critical_tests.command: ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_web_app.py tests/test_web_listings.py tests/test_web_visual_signature_routes.py tests/test_reports_renderer.py tests/test_reports_dossier.py tests/test_scoring_engine.py tests/test_visual_signature.py

json_parse.command: for f in $(find examples/perceptual_library examples/brand3_lab examples/brand3_platform docs/deployment -name '*.json' | sort); do ./.venv/bin/python -m json.tool "$f" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
json_parse.note: Initial multi-file json.tool invocation was invalid CLI usage; rerun parsed one file at a time.

risks.mitigation: Acceptable for current partner-visible deployment; add gate or banner before stricter public launch.

risks.risk: Research artifacts are large and visible in repo
risks.mitigation: Keep labeled as examples/research and avoid treating as production runtime data.

risks.risk: macOS fork-safety LLM crash logs can appear in optional real LLM integration path
risks.mitigation: Does not block current critical suite; keep live LLM out of public report reads.

recommended: Decide whether lab routes need banner, access gate, or partner-only copy before broader public launch.
Keep research artifacts out of marketing claims until reviewed.
Continue preventing live LLM calls on public report reads.
